##NAMES=Sazhinite-(La)
##RRUFFID=R120053
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_3_LaSi_6_O_15_·2H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Aris quarry, near Windhoek, Namibia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Thin platy white crystals, associated with reddish brown accicular tuperssuatsiate and colorless granular natrolite. Note that the b-cell edge is half of that reported.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R120053
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 7.414 b: 8.162 c: 7.157 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 433.1 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
